promoted_facts.fact: Franchisee termination right requires 60-day cure period (vs. 30-day for franchisor defaults)
Terminated development agreement income: $42K (2024), $100K (2023), $50K (2022) recognized when dev agreements terminated/modified
Supplier rebate revenue declined from $1,165K (2023) to $980K (2024) — 15.9% decrease
Office lease expires March 2029; annual expense ~$75K; total future minimum payments $351K
Contract liabilities of $1,233,076 represent deferred franchise fee revenue to be recognized over franchise terms; $916K scheduled beyond 2029
Related party management services fee earned from outside-US franchisor: $265K (2024), $245K (2023), $117K (2022) — growing revenue stream
All fixed assets depreciated over 3-year useful life — very aggressive depreciation schedule
FDIC insurance exposure: cash balances at times exceeded insured limits
